plugins.reason: Representative settings and CSS plugin; a good low-risk runtime compatibility canary.
High-value command and capture workflow plugin that exercises commands, modal, vault, and settings surfaces.
Metadata/tag management plugin that tests note inspection and controlled vault updates.
Workspace startup/navigation plugin that tests workspace request surfaces without requiring full pane parity.
Core migration blocker for Obsidian users; needs explicit gate visibility even when native/script execution is blocked.
Canonical metadata/query plugin; guides native MindOS query and markdown processor compatibility priorities.
Task query/rendering plugin that probes metadata cache, markdown post-processing, and future native task views.
Popular view/navigation plugin; useful for validating snapshot view and workspace request boundaries.
Custom view with real workflow value; should become catalog/native rather than accidental full workspace emulation.
Top downloaded complex UI plugin; establishes the boundary between file compatibility and full runtime compatibility.
Representative editor enhancement plugin; validates CodeMirror/editor catalog-only gating.
Theme settings plugin that should stay in the lightweight settings/CSS compatibility lane.
Markdown formatting plugin that exercises settings, commands, editor-adjacent APIs, and no-op/catalog editor shims.
Markdown/codeblock rendering plugin that validates document snapshot and style handling.
Search/navigation plugin that highlights overlap with native MindOS retrieval and plugin catalog needs.
Metadata editing plugin that stresses frontmatter, file manager, settings, and controlled write boundaries.
Command/button automation plugin that probes safe interaction continuation and markdown UI boundaries.
Lightweight navigation plugin that should map to MindOS activity/recent file surfaces.
Daily/periodic notes workflow plugin that tests file creation, workspace opening, and date helpers.
Icon/style metadata plugin that probes scoped style/icon policy and native UI replacement boundaries.
